'''lanotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dyeline|dyeline]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dyeline|dyeline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lanotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lænetheth|lænetheth]] || [[word:lænethej|lænethej]] || [[word:lænethesh|lænethesh]] || [[word:lænethe|lænethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lanonothoth|lanonothoth]] || [[word:lanonothoj|lanonothoj]] || [[word:lanonothosh|lanonothosh]] || [[word:lanonotho|lanonotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lanothoth|lanothoth]] || [[word:lanothoj|lanothoj]] || [[word:lanothosh|lanothosh]] || [[word:lanotho|lanotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lanofthoth|lanofthoth]] || [[word:lanofthoj|lanofthoj]] || [[word:lanofthosh|lanofthosh]] || [[word:lanofthof|lanofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lanothotho|lanothotho]] || [[word:lanothojo|lanothojo]] || [[word:lanothosho|lanothosho]] || [[word:lanothoko|lanothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lanothoth|lanothoth]] || [[word:lanothoj|lanothoj]] || [[word:lanothosh|lanothosh]] || [[word:lanotho|lanotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lanothothol|lanothothol]] || [[word:lanothojol|lanothojol]] || [[word:lanothoshol|lanothoshol]] || [[word:lanothokol|lanothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lanothothotho|lanothothotho]] || [[word:lanothojojo|lanothojojo]] || [[word:lanothoshosho|lanothoshosho]] || [[word:lanothoko|lanothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lanothothon|lanothothon]] || [[word:lanothojon|lanothojon]] || [[word:lanothoshon|lanothoshon]] || [[word:lanothokon|lanothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lanothothoro|lanothothoro]] || [[word:lanothojoro|lanothojoro]] || [[word:lanothoshoro|lanothoshoro]] || [[word:lanothokoro|lanothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
